# Porchlight LLM guide

Porchlight is a native-CSS design system for SaaS apps. Use these docs when
building with models:

- Composition recipes: /guides/composition-recipes
- Layout primitives: /guides/layout
- Component reference: /components
- Preview examples: /preview
- Full model pack: /llms-full.txt

Core composition rules:

- Use layout primitives for structure: l-app-shell, l-container, l-stack,
  l-grid, l-cluster, l-sidebar.
- Use components for semantics and chrome: c-card, c-toolbar, c-page-header,
  c-form, c-field, c-table-wrap, c-table, c-pagination, c-nav, c-stat.
- Use utilities for small adjustments: u-muted, u-muted-sm, u-truncate,
  u-sr-only, u-min-0.
- Data table rule: always use a real table inside c-table-wrap. Do not make
  div-based tables.
- Toolbar rule: use c-page-header for page titles inside padded content; use
  c-toolbar on the edge of a data region.
- Card rule: do not nest cards inside cards for layout. Use l-grid,
  l-sidebar, l-stack, or sibling cards.
- Form rule: use real labels. For compact controls, use u-sr-only labels.

Best first examples:

- /preview/app-dashboard for a full app shell with KPI grid and data table.
- /preview/dashboard for a compact composition proof.
- /preview/app-dense for dense admin/data-console layouts.
